---
name: Chapter proposal
about: Propose a new chapter or major section
title: "[chapter] "
labels: ["chapter", "manuscript"]
assignees: []
---

## Proposal
Describe the chapter or section.

## Why it belongs
Explain the gap it fills.

## Reader outcome
What should the reader be able to understand or do afterward?

## Required concepts
List the concepts that must be covered.

## Required tables or diagrams
List likely visual assets.

## Risks
What could go wrong if this material is added poorly?
